headline: Lam Research (LRCX) Opens Boise Office To Get Closer To Micron’s Memory Expansion
summary: Lam Research opened a new office in Boise to support Micron’s high volume memory manufacturing. The move deepens Lam Research’s role in Micron’s expansion of advanced memory production. The development follows strong recent share price performance for NasdaqGS:LRCX. Lam Research, traded as NasdaqGS:LRCX, is moving closer to a key customer with its new Boise office aligned to Micron’s memory expansion plans. The stock last closed at $374.8 and is up 16.2% over the past 30 days and 102.5%...
